infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RescueLog uses the camera to photograph rescued food laid out at pop-up sites.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RescueLog records the pop-up location so each log is tied to the right site.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RescueLog can attach existing photos of rescued food to a pop-up log.
